---
title: "Day 1 - Arrival"
format: html
---

::: top-banner
:::

::: {.text-center}
# **Santa Cruz, Galápagos, Ecuador**
### *June 8, 2026*
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
- **5:00 - 5:30 pm**  
  Transfer from the airport to **Santa Cruz Island**  
  *Transportation coordinated by <a href="https://isaakbm.github.io/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Isaac Brito-Morales</a> and <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Dylan Glave</a>*

- **6:00 pm**  
  Hotel check-in  
  *Depending on your room assignment, please check your email for hotel instructions*  
  *Address: TBD*

- **7:30 - 9:00 pm**  
  Dinner and workshop objectives  
  *Location: TBD*
:::
